description:
Letter of business in which the writer requests the recipient purchase for him a measure of oil, two ‘futa’ (sari-like cloth), and two dinars of dried fruit (‘zabib’). Abu Imran, Abu al-Rida, and the town of Qus are mentioned, and the writer sends greeting to Abu al-Faraj and Yishaq. EMS (Information from Goitein's index cards)

The sender has spoken to Ibn al-ʿIrāqī, who reports that he sent all the letters to their addressees "after the conquest of the land" (futūḥ al-balad); he asks the addressee to try to sell the indigo and buying with its price khazāsh (low-quality silk) or fūṭas (wraps); he asks the addressee to speak to Khallūf to
description_he: מכתב עסקי שבו הכותב מבקש מהנמען לקנות עבורו שמן, שתי פוטות (בגד) ושני דינרים של צימוקים. מוזכרים אבו עמראן, אבו אל-ריצ'א ועיר קוס.
